reviews.title: A very horrible experience and would not stay again.
reviews.negatives: The staff was not really friendly, i was not satisfied. My check in was at 3 but only got the room at 5:30. I had a 20 hour flight and they took me in lounge to wait for my room but i had to keep asking about my room they kept telling me that its 30 minutes and it was only ready. When i went the fourth time to check, they finally told me that in 30 minutes  the room would be ready and if i wanted to stay in a transfer room. Then when i went to the transfer room, it took them another hour for them to get my room ready. When we got our room, there was mold in the fridge, dirty ac, and it felt very muggy. I was upset because i felt that as a five star hotel it would keep its standards. Not only that, some of the staff was not friendly and I felt i was looked down upon. At check out the receptionist just took my key and didn’t ask me how was my stay and that was it. I also wanted to leave as soon as possible because it was just that bad.

reviews.title: Poor food and aged
reviews.text:
Food was acceptable but extremely poor for a 5star plus hotel.  Food lamps only partially warmed food.  There was variety but for a Christmas dinner it lacked any festive flavours. The all day dining has a very tired look and staff needed to be more upbeat...rather than tired the same as the decor. 
The property is overpriced for a similar experience at IHG hotels.  Too much money for very little service.  Room was large and clean, expected for a 5 star.  But alas that's as far as it goes.  I would say check in staff were polite....but overall the experience lacked any cheer or even presence. No music in lobby.  Almost resembled the underground in Moscow...quiet and cold.
I have worked in hospitality for some time, 20+ years and found that Ritz Carlton, mega kuningan to be not worth staying at, of which I will not again.

reviews.title: They don't care about Babies
reviews.text: Everything was great when we checked in,  we were well taken care of and felt like we were royalty.  Which was great.  Now I am not a rich man by any means and never have claimed to be, but I am a hard working one who wants to make my wife and 5 month old baby feel good and treat them once in a while.  So I decided to take them to the Ritz for a very nice time.  I was wrong.  I am NOT a scientist, but no smoking signs mean no smoking right? Well not at the Ritz, where they feel its ok to subject a 5 month old baby to second hand smoke.  We had a non smoking room and non smoking floor, but other more "important" guests wanted to smoke so our whole floor was filled with cigarette smoke and nobody seemed to care about my baby, because the other "important" , "richer" guests wanted to have some cigarettes.  But it's ok, maybe it's my fault for assuming a fancy place like the Ritz would care at all about the middle class.  Also my wife wanted to get some air on the terrace downstairs, but when she went down she was treated like a trespasser and asked to sit outside with the drivers!  I was awestruck!  I guess if you are a simple average man like me and don't have money coming out of your rear end then this is not the place to stay.  If you are rich and have lots to spend then you are the type of clientele the Ritz is looking for.  So if you have a better mind and have morals maybe this is NOT the place to stay.  I certainly will NOT endorse a place that seems to think it's ok for a 5 month old baby to be in amongst second hand smoke, will you?
reviews.positives: Overpriced, Arrogance and for the Rich

reviews.title: Not as good as the normal Ritz Carlton standrd
reviews.text: Stayed here for 3 nights with my wife and kids.  Location is near the CBD.  The staff were very kind and helpful, especially the staff in the restaurant who were always eager to help and always offering special menu to us and our kids.  Too bad the room wasn't as good as we expected.  The water pressure in the bathroom was very low.  When the shower is on and someone flushes the toilet, the shower would lose pressure to the point that there was no water dripping, the same goes with the wastafel.  It was late night when we arrived and we didn't want maintenance to come to the room we already disinfected so we had to wait until the following day before the hotel engineering crew came and adjusted the water pressure.  It seems the water pressure was deliberately lowered to save water.  I expected a hotel brand like Ritz Carlton shouldn't done such a thing.  I have stayed in Ritz in Bali and Singapore and none has such problem.  Another thing we were disappointed about was that the room AC was too cold.  We couldn't set it to a comfortable temperature.  When we turned on with Auto Fan at 25c, the room was very cold and the airflow as blowing to our body when we were sleeping.  We tried to set it to lowest fan setting but it was still the same.  When we turned off the AC the room became humid and hot, we couldn't get a good night sleep because of this.  Also, on the first night, we turned off the room lights by turning off the "MASTER" switch beside the bed, little did we know that the switch also turned of the Electric Toilet, which disabled the toilet to flush.  So we thought the Electric Toilet was broken and we couldn't flush it the whole time even after we urinating in it a few times.  We informed the engineering staff about this and he also realized that the Electric toilet shouldn't be switched off by the "MASTER" switch beside the bed, this is bad design.  We will definitely stay in a different hotel next time we visit Jakarta.

reviews.title: Great Service but old
reviews.text:
The Ritz-Carlton Mega Kuningan is centrally located and highly accessible. While the lobby—which requires passing through a security checkpoint—is grand and staffed by welcoming professionals, the hotel's aging facilities are hard to ignore.
The rooms are massive, which makes the layout even more disappointing. In a smaller, standard hotel, having the bed visible immediately upon entry might be expected, but given the generous square footage here, there was no need for such a design. While the walk-in closet connecting the bedroom and bathroom features its own door, it’s a shame the layout didn't include a similar partition or foyer to separate the main entrance from the sleeping area.
The worn-out shower shows clear signs of age; turning the handle gave me an immediate, sinking feeling that something was malfunctioning. Despite checking in at midnight and looking forward to a hot shower, the water never warmed up. Although it was repaired the following morning, the hot water failed again the next day.
I received an apology at checkout, but it is a pity that such a fundamental issue overshadowed the hotel's better qualities. That said, the breakfast at the Club Lounge was quite good, offering a magnificent view of the city skyline.

Quantity certainly very good. Quality could be a little better when compared to other hotels in this range. Gym was great and so were all the employees around the spa. reviews.title: Trouble while Check-In
reviews.text:
Disclaimer: Without intending to damage the reputation, this is my honest review of my personal experience. I don't know if this has happened previously at this 5-star hotel. 

When me and my family arrived at this hotel, we were immediately directed to the banquet room to check in, where it turned out that some other people had previously experienced similar check-in issues. 

I assumed I would have an excellent experience while spending my New Year's here. However, I had to wait a long time for check-in. I ordered two rooms. One was ready at 3:30 PM, while the other was ready around 5 PM. The standard check-in time is usually 3:00 PM. 

When I asked their staff, they only mentioned that there's trouble in their system without any further explanation or even a simple apology in writing after such incident. 

I feel like spent nearly 10 million rupiahs for nothing.

reviews.title: Cost-effective five-star hotel
reviews.text:
The cost performance was good, and I was able to stay at a reasonable price. I was very grateful to be able to use the club room due to some member benefit.

The facilities are old, but they are well cleaned and maintained. The staff members were friendly, providing a warm hospitality experience. The pool is spacious, and the gym is well-equipped. I also enjoyed being able to use the sauna and the large jacuzzi, making the hotel stay very enjoyable. In the club room, they offered daily changing menus for lunch and dinner appetizers, and when I visited, there was steak which was delicious. However, it seemed that there weren't enough staff during peak times. 

I had breakfast in the restaurant, which was tasty and had a rich menu. However, it was disappointing that the flowers on the table were withered. I thought it was just my table, but I noticed that the flowers on the surrounding tables were also withered, which made me wonder if it was okay.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I would like to stay again.

reviews.title: Good, but with notes
reviews.text:
Stayed here with my family during the Eid holiday season in 2026. Overall, we had a fairly good experience. The room design feels quite dated, especially the carpet. However, the cleanliness of both the room and bathroom was good. When we entered the room, we were welcomed by a pleasant scent, although the room still felt a bit humid, possibly because it had not been occupied for some time.

The less pleasant experience happened during breakfast on Eid day. The restaurant area was quite chaotic due to the large number of guests, while the staff seemed insufficient to handle the crowd. It is understandable during a peak holiday period, but it should also be an important lesson for the hotel to prepare more staff during busy seasons to maintain service quality.

First thing first, i came to the lounge for dinner but it was quite chaos. The lounge not sufficient for handling a lot of guest to have dinner, the staff also cannot help managing the queue so its like we are at the food court, people were waiting us next of our table and asking are we finished soon. And also the staff take a very long time to cater our request. 
Breakfast also so-so for me nothing special. But my husband did complain about the coffee. He request espresso shot but they give coffee from a thermos or something not freshly made.
For lunch actually getting better. The food was delicious, the staff very attentive managing the guest coming, makesure every order were delivered.
Oh, note their swimming pool (if im not mistaken) only one for adult (120cm water level)

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Really good service. When I checked in, I asked if there's any fee for a connecting room (I booked 2 rooms) and when they tell me there is, I decided not to take it. Luckily, when I came back to the hotel (after going someplace else to eat), I asked for the room key and got upgraded with a connecting room without any fee at all, which is wonderful.
They have couple of time options for breakfast (I chose at 7:45-8:45), which is quite a fast timing but it is understandable because of the pandemic & to avoid putting too much people at the same time)
Anyway, me & my family had a great time staying here. Thanks Ritz-Carlton!

reviews.title: A lovely 5 stars hotel in the heart of Jakarta
reviews.text:
Ritz Carlton Mega Kuningan located in the heart of Jakarta, near many embassies and of course shopping center. 
I like its swimming pool which enhanced with Balinese style gazebo.
Buffet breakfast was nice, even though salmon wasn't so fresh but all other were delicious.
Very big and clean room with all 5 stars facilities you can expect, even Ritz Carlton chocolates, as usual.
Staffs were friendly and helpful. But one GRO staff didn't really have a good collaborate with a bellboy about my free transfer to Pasaraya.
I love their security system. 
Will come back for sure.
Thanks, Ritz Carlton Mega Kuningan.

reviews.title: A little bit shy of perfection
reviews.text:
Pros
Spacious room, top grade facilities, great location, super friendly and helpful staff. Great taste for food. 

Cons
Not the best amenities, the shampoo, soap, and toothpaste seem like ordinary ones. Had better ones at Fairmont and Marriott. To many security check and maybe have a better protocol for security checking. Parking these days are cashless, but what Ritz carlton had was definitely old fashioned. Although the breakfast was delicious, but spent three days and the menu doesn't have the variety I looked for. 

All and all was a satisfying experience. But like I mentioned, just a bit shy of perfection

All have such a wonderful warm way about them and they are just incredibly nice! Will definitely be coming back here!

reviews.title: Amazing Location and Great Value!
reviews.text: Located in Mega Kuningan, the hotel is conveniently located to malls such as the Lotte Shopping Avenue. Just 45 minutes by car from the airport, the hotel is well connected to most road and rail links. The first thing that struck me was how warm and attentive the staff were. Also, my room was really spacious, and I had a great view of the city. Free wifi was also available throughout the property. Despite the warm and humid weather, the air conditioning system was able to maintain a comfortable and cool temperature throughout my stay. The hotel also has an outdoor swimming pool, and a fully equipped gym, for all guests 24/7. An overall great stay with Ritz-Carlton Jakarta, Mega Kuningan.

reviews.title: A Truly Delightful Stay for All Generations
reviews.text:
Our stay at the Ritz-Carlton Mega Kuningan was a wonderful journey of relaxation and comfort for my family. Although our group was quite diverse—including a 7-year-old child, a 21-year-old young man, and a middle-aged couple—the hotel's thoughtful care and kindness made it a truly pleasant experience for everyone.

We would like to share some special highlights:

For our youngest, Sung-ryung: A huge thank you to Ms. Vondra and Ms. Yolita. Their kind attention and the sweet gifts of chocolate and snacks brought so much joy to our child.

A pleasant surprise: We were also amazed by Ms. Melany, whose fluent Korean made our family feel even more at home. We deeply appreciate her warm and professional service.

Fitness & Wellness: My 21-year-old son thoroughly enjoyed the modern fitness center and the relaxing environment. He was so impressed that he already wants to visit again! Special thanks to Mr. Warso for his expert guidance and friendly assistance, which made our family’s time there very enjoyable.

Sauna Experience: My wife found the sauna facilities to be modern, clean, and absolutely perfect.

Thank you all for your exceptional hospitality. We are already planning to return this weekend to enjoy your wonderful buffet again!
reviews.room_type: Grand Room, Guest room, 2 King, City view

Great appreciation for Mr Jonathan & Mr Krisna from The Lounge area that were so nice & friendly with my boys..
And thank you also to Ms Melany & Beatrice that already help us from checking in time until we got the rooms..

reviews.title: Valentine's Day commemorative
reviews.text: We stayed for a Valentine's celebration. I learned that in Indonesia, there is a custom where men give red roses and chocolates to women, so I requested this from the hotel two days prior. After exchanging several emails, they delivered beautiful roses, and the surprise was a success. The mirror was decorated with handwritten Valentine's decorations and balloon art, and the bed was adorned with decorations made of towels. I was moved by the heartfelt service, and my partner was overjoyed with a brilliant smile. As expected from the Ritz-Carlton.

It was our first time using it, and there was a Trekpik gem, so we accessed the lounge. I only drink beer, so I didn't have any wine, but the draft beer was really not it.
